meta.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

title.en: Postpartum hemorrhage from uterine atony in a grand multiparous client with pregnancy-induced hypertension
title.zh: 妊娠期高血压经产妇因子宫收缩乏力发生的产后出血

summary.en: A 32-year-old G5P5 client is one hour postpartum after a vaginal birth of a 4.2 kg infant. She has pregnancy-induced hypertension treated with labetalol and mild intermittent asthma. She develops heavy bleeding, a boggy displaced fundus, tachycardia, and hypotension relative to her hypertensive baseline.
summary.zh: 一名 32 岁 G5P5 产妇在阴道分娩 4.2 kg 新生儿后 1 小时处于产后恢复期。她有妊娠期高血压，使用拉贝洛尔治疗，并有轻度间歇性哮喘。她出现大量出血、子宫底偏移且松软、心动过速，以及相对高血压基线明显下降的血压。

content.en: G5P5, one hour postpartum after vaginal birth of a 4.2 kg infant. Second stage lasted 3 hours; oxytocin augmentation was used during first stage. Placenta delivered intact and appeared complete. Pregnancy-induced hypertension was diagnosed at 34 weeks and treated with labetalol 200 mg twice daily. History includes mild intermittent asthma. No bleeding disorder, prior PPH, or uterine surgery. Admission BP 148/94 mmHg. Admission Hgb 11.8 g/dL, Hct 35.2%. Blood type O-positive; type and screen sent on admission. Oxytocin 20 units in 1 L LR has been infusing for about 50 minutes after placental delivery.
content.zh: G5P5，阴道分娩 4.2 kg 新生儿后 1 小时。第二产程持续 3 小时；第一产程使用催产素加强宫缩。胎盘娩出完整，检查外观完整。34 周诊断妊娠期高血压，使用拉贝洛尔 200 mg 每日两次。既往有轻度间歇性哮喘。无出血性疾病、既往产后出血或子宫手术史。入院血压 148/94 mmHg。入院 Hgb 11.8 g/dL，Hct 35.2%。血型 O 阳性；入院已送血型筛查。胎盘娩出后已按医嘱输注催产素 20 units 加入 1 L LR，约 50 分钟。

content.en: Client says she feels 'dizzy and wet.' She is pale, diaphoretic, alert, oriented, and anxious. Underpads show a large amount of blood; the perineal pad placed 20 minutes ago is saturated. Vital signs: T 36.8 °C, HR 118, BP 90/62 mmHg, RR 22, SpO2 97% on room air. Uterus is two fingerbreadths above the umbilicus, deviated to the right, and boggy; it does not stay firm after massage. Lochia is heavy with dark-red flow and several small clots. Repaired second-degree perineal laceration has no active bleeding and no visible hematoma. Bladder is palpable above the symphysis pubis. Skin is cool and clammy; capillary refill 3 seconds. Estimated blood loss is 600 mL and visibly increasing.
content.zh: 患者说自己“头晕，而且感觉很湿”。她面色苍白、出汗，意识清醒、定向力正常但焦虑。护理垫上有大量血液；20 分钟前更换的会阴垫已饱和。生命体征：T 36.8 °C，HR 118，BP 90/62 mmHg，RR 22，室内空气 SpO2 97%。子宫底位于脐上两横指，向右偏移且松软；按摩后不能维持坚硬。恶露量多，暗红色流出并有数个小血块。已缝合的二度会阴裂伤无活动性出血，也未见血肿。耻骨联合上方可触及膀胱。皮肤湿冷；毛细血管再充盈 3 秒。估计失血量 600 mL，并且肉眼可见仍在增加。

content.en: Hgb 11.8 g/dL, Hct 35.2%, platelets 188,000/µL, fibrinogen 410 mg/dL, INR 1.0, aPTT 28 sec. Sodium 138 mEq/L, potassium 3.9 mEq/L, creatinine 0.7 mg/dL, glucose 92 mg/dL. Urinalysis: 1+ protein, otherwise unremarkable.
content.zh: Hgb 11.8 g/dL，Hct 35.2%，血小板 188,000/µL，纤维蛋白原 410 mg/dL，INR 1.0，aPTT 28 秒。钠 138 mEq/L，钾 3.9 mEq/L，肌酐 0.7 mg/dL，血糖 92 mg/dL。尿检：蛋白 1+，其余无明显异常。

title.zh: 第 1 阶段：初始出血处理

narrative.en: The nurse begins external fundal massage with lower uterine support and calls for assistance. Straight catheterization drains 450 mL of clear urine; the uterus descends to the umbilicus but remains boggy. Oxytocin is confirmed infusing and increased per standing order to infuse the remaining volume over 30 minutes. Two 16-gauge peripheral IVs are placed; warmed LR is hung wide open. Quantitative blood loss is now 800 mL. Vital signs: HR 124, BP 86/58, RR 24, SpO2 96% on room air. The provider is called to bedside.
narrative.zh: 护士开始在下方支托子宫的同时进行外部子宫底按摩，并呼叫协助。一次性导尿排出清亮尿液 450 mL；子宫下降至脐水平但仍松软。确认催产素正在输注，并按常规医嘱提高速度，在 30 分钟内输完剩余液体。置入两条 16G 外周静脉通路；温热 LR 全速开放。定量失血现为 800 mL。生命体征：HR 124，BP 86/58，RR 24，室内空气 SpO2 96%。已呼叫医师到床旁。

title.en: Stage 2: Persistent atony and medication selection
title.zh: 第 2 阶段：子宫收缩乏力持续及药物选择

narrative.en: Despite massage and increased oxytocin, the uterus intermittently firms then relaxes within seconds. QBL is 1,200 mL. Vital signs: HR 132, BP 80/52, RR 26, SpO2 95% on room air. The client is confused and markedly pale with capillary refill 4 seconds. The provider rules out retained placental fragments and unrepaired cervical/vaginal lacerations. Available uterotonics are methylergonovine 0.2 mg IM, misoprostol 800 mcg rectally, and carboprost 250 mcg IM. Stat labs: Hgb 8.1 g/dL, Hct 24.3%, platelets 162,000/µL, fibrinogen 280 mg/dL, INR 1.1, aPTT 30 sec. Type and crossmatch for 2 units PRBC is sent. The unit protocol orders tranexamic acid 1 g IV over 10 minutes within 3 hours of birth for PPH not responding to first-line uterotonics.
narrative.zh: 尽管持续按摩并增加催产素输注，子宫仍间歇性变硬后数秒内又松弛。定量失血 1,200 mL。生命体征：HR 132，BP 80/52，RR 26，室内空气 SpO2 95%。患者意识混乱、明显苍白，毛细血管再充盈 4 秒。医师排除胎盘碎片残留及未修补的宫颈/阴道裂伤。可用宫缩药包括甲基麦角新碱 0.2 mg IM、米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药、卡前列素 250 mcg IM。急查化验：Hgb 8.1 g/dL，Hct 24.3%，血小板 162,000/µL，纤维蛋白原 280 mg/dL，INR 1.1，aPTT 30 秒。已送 2 单位 PRBC 配血。病区方案医嘱：对一线宫缩药反应不佳的产后出血，在分娩后 3 小时内给予氨甲环酸 1 g IV，10 分钟输注。

title.en: Stage 3: Response evaluation after source control
title.zh: 第 3 阶段：止血源控制后的反应评估

narrative.en: Misoprostol 800 mcg was given rectally, tranexamic acid 1 g IV was infused over 10 minutes, and the provider performed aggressive bimanual compression. The uterus is now firm at the umbilicus. Lochia is moderate dark red without clots. QBL has plateaued at 1,450 mL with no further active accumulation for 15 minutes. Vital signs: HR 112, BP 94/60, RR 20, SpO2 97% on 2 L nasal cannula. The client is alert and oriented but fatigued and mildly dizzy with repositioning. The first PRBC unit is infusing through a dedicated large-bore IV; a second unit is ordered. Repeat labs: Hgb 7.4 g/dL, Hct 22.1%, platelets 148,000/µL, fibrinogen 240 mg/dL, INR 1.2, aPTT 32 sec. Foley output is 25 mL/hr of concentrated amber urine. Fundal checks continue every 15 minutes.
narrative.zh: 已给予米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药，氨甲环酸 1 g IV 10 分钟输注，医师进行了积极双手子宫压迫。现在子宫坚硬，位于脐水平。恶露为中等量暗红色，无血块。定量失血停留在 1,450 mL，15 分钟内无进一步活动性增加。生命体征：HR 112，BP 94/60，RR 20，鼻导管 2 L 下 SpO2 97%。患者清醒、定向力正常，但疲乏，变换体位时仍轻度头晕。第 1 单位 PRBC 正通过专用大口径 IV 输注；已医嘱随后输注第 2 单位。复查化验：Hgb 7.4 g/dL，Hct 22.1%，血小板 148,000/µL，纤维蛋白原 240 mg/dL，INR 1.2，aPTT 32 秒。Foley 尿量 25 mL/hr，为浓缩琥珀色尿。继续每 15 分钟检查子宫底。

stem.en: Highlight the assessment findings that require immediate follow-up for postpartum hemorrhage from uterine atony.
stem.zh: 请标出需要立即针对子宫收缩乏力性产后出血进行处理的评估发现。

text.en: Temperature 36.8 °C.
Heart rate 118 beats/min.
text.zh: 心率 118 次/分。

text.en: Blood pressure 90/62 mmHg, down from her hypertensive admission baseline of 148/94 mmHg.
text.zh: 血压 90/62 mmHg，低于入院时 148/94 mmHg 的妊娠期高血压基线。

text.en: SpO2 97% on room air.
text.zh: 室内空气下 SpO2 97%。

text.en: The uterus is two fingerbreadths above the umbilicus, deviated to the right, and boggy.
text.zh: 子宫底位于脐上两横指，向右偏移，触之松软。

text.en: It does not stay firm after gentle massage.
text.zh: 轻柔按摩后子宫不能持续变硬。

text.en: Lochia is heavy with a steady dark-red flow and several small clots.
text.zh: 恶露量多，持续暗红色流出，并有数个小血块。

text.en: The repaired second-degree perineal laceration has no active bleeding and no visible hematoma.
text.zh: 已缝合的二度会阴裂伤无活动性出血，也未见血肿。

text.en: The bladder is palpable above the symphysis pubis.
text.zh: 耻骨联合上方可触及膀胱。

text.en: Skin is cool and clammy with capillary refill of 3 seconds.
text.zh: 皮肤湿冷，毛细血管再充盈时间为 3 秒。

text.en: Estimated blood loss is 600 mL and visibly increasing.
text.zh: 估计失血量为 600 mL，且肉眼可见仍在增加。

text.en: She denies chest pain or shortness of breath.
text.zh: 她否认胸痛或气短。

correct.en: The key cues are a boggy displaced uterus that cannot maintain tone, heavy lochia with clots, blood loss already at 600 mL and increasing, tachycardia, hypotension relative to a hypertensive baseline, poor peripheral perfusion, and a palpable bladder that can worsen uterine displacement. Normal temperature and oxygen saturation do not define the problem, and the intact perineal repair helps narrow the source away from a laceration.
correct.zh: 关键线索包括子宫底偏移且松软、不能维持张力，恶露量多伴血块，失血量已达 600 mL 且仍在增加，心动过速，相对于妊娠期高血压基线明显下降的血压，外周灌注差，以及可触及的膀胱充盈（可加重子宫偏移）。体温和血氧正常不能说明当前问题；会阴修补处完整有助于把出血来源从裂伤转向子宫。

text.en: A normal temperature does not define this acute hemorrhage.
text.zh: 体温正常，不能说明当前急性出血问题。

text.en: Tachycardia is an early sign of volume loss and shock in postpartum hemorrhage.
text.zh: 心动过速是产后出血导致容量不足和休克的早期表现。

text.en: The absolute BP is low, and the drop from a hypertensive baseline makes the hemodynamic compromise more severe.
text.zh: 血压本身偏低，且相对妊娠期高血压基线明显下降，提示血流动力学受损更严重。

text.en: Normal oxygen saturation does not rule out hemorrhagic shock and is not the defining cue here.
text.zh: 血氧饱和度正常不能排除失血性休克，也不是本题的关键线索。

text.en: A boggy, displaced uterus is the hallmark cue for uterine atony and impaired contraction.
text.zh: 子宫底偏移且松软是子宫收缩乏力、收缩无效的标志性线索。

text.en: Failure to sustain tone after massage shows that atony is ongoing.
text.zh: 按摩后不能维持张力说明子宫收缩乏力仍在持续。

text.en: Heavy lochia with clots supports ongoing uterine bleeding from the placental site.
text.zh: 恶露量多并有血块，支持胎盘附着部位仍在子宫性出血。

text.en: This is relevant because it helps rule away a laceration source, but it is not itself an abnormal hemorrhage cue needing immediate correction.
text.zh: 这一正常发现有助于排除裂伤来源，但它本身不是需要立即处理的异常出血线索。

text.en: A distended bladder can displace the uterus and prevent effective contraction, worsening atony.
text.zh: 膀胱充盈会使子宫偏移并妨碍有效收缩，从而加重子宫收缩乏力。

text.en: Cool clammy skin and delayed capillary refill are peripheral perfusion cues of hypovolemia.
text.zh: 皮肤湿冷和毛细血管再充盈延迟提示低血容量导致外周灌注不足。

text.en: Blood loss of 600 mL after a vaginal birth meets the traditional PPH threshold and is still increasing.
text.zh: 阴道分娩后失血 600 mL 已达到传统产后出血阈值，并且仍在增加。

text.en: Absence of chest pain or dyspnea is reassuring but does not address the hemorrhage source.
text.zh: 无胸痛或气短较为 reassuring，但不能说明出血来源或严重程度。

testTakingStrategy.en: In early postpartum bleeding, first connect uterine tone, lochia, blood-loss amount, and perfusion signs. Compare vital signs with the client's baseline, not just the normal range.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 早期产后出血题先把子宫张力、恶露、失血量和灌注表现联系起来；生命体征要和该患者的基线比较，而不只看正常范围。

definition.en: A uterus that feels soft instead of firm after birth, suggesting poor contraction.
definition.zh: 产后子宫触之柔软而不是坚硬，提示收缩不良。

definition.en: Postpartum vaginal drainage of blood and tissue from the uterus.
definition.zh: 产后从子宫经阴道排出的血液和组织。

definition.en: Measurement of blood loss by weighing or collecting blood rather than estimating visually.
definition.zh: 通过称重或收集血液来测量失血量，而不是仅凭目测估计。

stem.en: Complete the clinical reasoning statement using the available Stage 1 findings.
stem.zh: 根据第 1 阶段可获得的资料，完成临床推理陈述。

template.en: The most likely cause of the hemorrhage is {{dd_condition}} because {{dd_best_evidence}}. Uterine inversion is unlikely because {{dd_inversion_ruleout}}.
template.zh: 最可能的出血原因是 {{dd_condition}}，因为 {{dd_best_evidence}}。子宫内翻的可能性较低，因为 {{dd_inversion_ruleout}}。

text.en: uterine atony
text.zh: 子宫收缩乏力

text.en: cervical or vaginal laceration
text.zh: 宫颈或阴道裂伤

text.en: retained placental tissue
text.zh: 胎盘组织残留

text.en: uterine inversion
text.zh: 子宫内翻

text.en: the boggy fundus briefly firms with massage but immediately relaxes
text.zh: 子宫底松软，按摩后短暂变硬但很快又松弛

text.en: the repaired second-degree laceration is intact
text.zh: 二度裂伤修补处完整

text.en: the client is O-positive with a negative antibody screen
text.zh: 患者 O 型 Rh 阳性且抗体筛查阴性

text.en: the urinalysis shows 1+ protein
text.zh: 尿检显示蛋白 1+

text.en: the fundus is palpable above the umbilicus
text.zh: 子宫底可在脐上触及

text.en: several small clots are present
text.zh: 可见数个小血块

text.en: oxytocin was used during labor
text.zh: 产程中使用过催产素

text.en: the infant weighed 4.2 kg
text.zh: 新生儿体重 4.2 kg

correct.en: A boggy uterus that will not maintain tone after massage identifies uterine atony as the primary mechanism. The intact laceration repair argues against a traumatic lower-tract source. Retained tissue is possible early in a PPH workup, but the placenta was inspected as complete and the defining cue is uterine relaxation. Inversion is unlikely because the fundus remains palpable in the abdomen.
correct.zh: 按摩后不能维持张力的松软子宫指向子宫收缩乏力。会阴裂伤修补处完整，不支持下生殖道创伤性出血。胎盘残留在产后出血评估中可以考虑，但胎盘已检查完整，且决定性线索是子宫松弛。子宫底仍可在腹部触及，因此子宫内翻可能性低。

text.en: Correct: the uterus is boggy and does not maintain tone.
text.zh: 正确：子宫松软，不能维持张力。

text.en: A laceration usually causes persistent bleeding with a firm uterus; the repair here is intact and not actively bleeding.
text.zh: 裂伤通常表现为子宫坚硬但仍持续出血；本例修补处完整且无活动性出血。

text.en: Retained tissue can cause atony, but the placenta was documented intact and no retained-fragment cue is present at Stage 1.
text.zh: 胎盘残留可导致子宫收缩不良，但本例胎盘记录为完整，第 1 阶段没有残留组织线索。

text.en: Inversion would usually make the fundus absent from its expected abdominal position or visible/protruding vaginally.
text.zh: 子宫内翻通常表现为腹部预期位置触不到子宫底，或阴道内可见/突出肿块。

text.en: Correct: inability to sustain uterine tone is the central cue for atony.
text.zh: 正确：不能维持子宫张力是收缩乏力的核心线索。

text.en: This helps rule away laceration but is not the best positive evidence for atony.
text.zh: 这有助于排除裂伤，但不是支持子宫收缩乏力的最佳阳性证据。

text.en: Blood type and antibody screen matter for transfusion planning, not identifying the hemorrhage source.
text.zh: 血型和抗体筛查对输血准备重要，但不能判断出血来源。

text.en: Proteinuria supports the hypertensive pregnancy history, not the immediate cause of bleeding.
text.zh: 蛋白尿支持妊娠期高血压病史，但不是当前出血原因。

text.en: Correct: a palpable abdominal fundus makes inversion unlikely.
text.zh: 正确：腹部可触及子宫底，使子宫内翻可能性降低。

text.en: Clots support hemorrhage but do not distinguish inversion from other causes.
text.zh: 血块支持出血，但不能区分子宫内翻和其他原因。

text.en: Oxytocin exposure is relevant to labor history but does not rule out inversion.
text.zh: 催产素使用与产程有关，但不能排除子宫内翻。

text.en: Macrosomia is a risk factor for atony, not a direct rule-out for inversion.
text.zh: 巨大儿是子宫收缩乏力的风险因素，但不是直接排除子宫内翻的依据。

testTakingStrategy.en: For PPH differentials, ask whether the uterus is firm or boggy. Boggy points to tone; firm with bleeding points more toward trauma or tissue.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 区分产后出血原因时先问子宫是坚硬还是松软。松软指向“张力”问题；子宫坚硬但仍出血则更偏向创伤或组织残留。

definition.en: Failure of the postpartum uterus to contract firmly enough to compress placental-site vessels.
definition.zh: 产后子宫不能充分收缩以压迫胎盘附着部位血管。

definition.en: A rare emergency in which the uterus turns inside out after birth.
definition.zh: 产后子宫翻转内陷的一种罕见急症。

definition.en: Placental fragments left in the uterus that can prevent contraction and cause bleeding.
definition.zh: 胎盘碎片残留在子宫内，可妨碍子宫收缩并导致出血。

stem.en: The provider orders a second uterotonic. Which medication should the nurse administer from the available unit options?
stem.zh: 医嘱追加第二种宫缩药。护士应从病区可用药物中给予哪一种？

text.en: Administer misoprostol 800 mcg rectally.
text.zh: 给予米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药。

text.en: Administer methylergonovine 0.2 mg IM.
text.zh: 给予甲基麦角新碱 0.2 mg IM。

text.en: Administer carboprost tromethamine 250 mcg IM.
text.zh: 给予卡前列素氨丁三醇 250 mcg IM。

text.en: Hold all additional uterotonics until the repeat CBC and coagulation panel result.
text.zh: 在复查 CBC 和凝血功能结果出来前暂停所有追加宫缩药。

correct.en: Misoprostol is the safe second-line uterotonic in this client because methylergonovine is contraindicated by pregnancy-induced hypertension and carboprost is unsafe with asthma. Current hemorrhagic hypotension does not remove the methylergonovine contraindication.
correct.zh: 本例中米索前列醇是安全的二线宫缩药，因为妊娠期高血压禁用甲基麦角新碱，哮喘病史使卡前列素不安全。当前因失血导致的低血压并不能解除甲基麦角新碱的禁忌。

text.en: Correct: misoprostol treats atony and avoids the hypertension contraindication of methylergonovine and the asthma risk of carboprost.
text.zh: 正确：米索前列醇可治疗子宫收缩乏力，同时避开甲基麦角新碱的高血压禁忌和卡前列素的哮喘风险。

text.en: Methylergonovine is contraindicated with pregnancy-induced hypertension because vasoconstriction can cause severe rebound hypertension once volume is restored.
text.zh: 甲基麦角新碱禁用于妊娠期高血压患者，因为补足容量后血管收缩作用可能导致严重反跳性高血压。

text.en: Carboprost should be avoided in asthma because it can trigger bronchospasm.
text.zh: 卡前列素应避免用于哮喘患者，因为可诱发支气管痉挛。

text.en: The client is unstable with ongoing hemorrhage; uterotonic treatment must not wait for labs when the atony source is clear.
text.zh: 患者不稳定且仍在出血；当子宫收缩乏力来源明确时，不应等化验结果才使用宫缩药。

testTakingStrategy.en: When medication choices all treat the same problem, screen each option for patient-specific contraindications before choosing the strongest drug.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 当多个药物都能治疗同一问题时，先根据患者个体禁忌证筛选，而不是直接选择作用最强的药。

definition.en: A medication that stimulates uterine contraction.
definition.zh: 促进子宫收缩的药物。

definition.en: A uterotonic with vasoconstrictive effects; unsafe in hypertensive disorders.
definition.zh: 一种具有血管收缩作用的宫缩药；高血压相关疾病中不安全。

definition.en: A prostaglandin uterotonic that can worsen bronchospasm in asthma.
definition.zh: 一种前列腺素类宫缩药，可加重哮喘患者支气管痉挛。

stem.en: Which actions should occur now as part of the coordinated team response? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 此时哪些措施应作为团队协作反应立即进行？选择所有适用项。

text.en: Maintain continuous external fundal massage or assist with bimanual compression.
text.zh: 持续进行外部子宫底按摩，或协助双手压迫子宫。

text.en: Administer the selected second uterotonic without delay.
text.zh: 立即给予已选择的第二种宫缩药。

text.en: Continue rapid warmed IV fluid resuscitation through large-bore access.
text.zh: 通过大口径静脉通路继续快速输入温热 IV 液体复苏。

text.en: Start tranexamic acid 1 g IV over 10 minutes per the PPH protocol after uterotonic administration is underway.
text.zh: 宫缩药给药开始后，按产后出血方案给予氨甲环酸 1 g IV，10 分钟输注。

text.en: Have another team member send the type and crossmatch specimen immediately.
text.zh: 由另一名团队成员立即送检配血标本。

text.en: Stop fundal massage so the primary nurse can draw the laboratory specimens first.
text.zh: 停止子宫底按摩，让责任护士先抽取化验标本。

text.en: Wait for the CBC and coagulation panel before giving tranexamic acid.
text.zh: 等待 CBC 和凝血功能结果后再给予氨甲环酸。

text.en: Complete full documentation before continuing additional hemorrhage interventions.
text.zh: 先完成完整护理记录，再继续其他止血干预。

correct.en: This is not a rigid ordered sequence. The team must maintain source control with massage/compression and a safe uterotonic while restoring circulating volume, starting ordered TXA within the protocol window, and preparing blood products through another team member. Lab and blood-bank tasks should not interrupt uterine compression.
correct.zh: 这不是严格的单线顺序题。团队必须同时通过按摩/压迫和安全宫缩药控制出血来源，恢复循环容量，在方案时间窗内启动已医嘱的氨甲环酸，并由其他团队成员准备血制品。化验和血库任务不能中断子宫压迫。

text.en: Correct: source control must be maintained continuously while the uterus is atonic.
text.zh: 正确：子宫收缩乏力时必须持续维持止血源控制。

text.en: Correct: a second safe uterotonic directly treats the atony causing the hemorrhage.
text.zh: 正确：安全的第二种宫缩药直接治疗造成出血的子宫收缩乏力。

text.en: Correct: rapid volume resuscitation treats hypotension and poor perfusion while bleeding control proceeds.
text.zh: 正确：在止血同时快速补充容量，以处理低血压和灌注不足。

text.en: Correct: TXA is ordered by protocol for PPH not responding to first-line uterotonics and should not be delayed once source-control actions are underway.
text.zh: 正确：对于一线宫缩药反应不佳的产后出血，方案已医嘱使用氨甲环酸；在止血源控制进行中的同时不应延误。

text.en: Correct: blood preparation is urgent, but it should be delegated to another team member so massage and resuscitation continue.
text.zh: 正确：备血很紧急，但应由其他团队成员完成，以便持续按摩和复苏。

text.en: Stopping compression for labs allows the atonic uterus to refill and bleed; team response prevents this delay.
text.zh: 为了抽血而停止压迫会使松软子宫再次充血出血；团队协作可避免这种延误。

text.en: The protocol indication is already met; waiting for labs delays a time-sensitive adjunct.
text.zh: 本例已符合方案适应证；等待化验会延误有时间窗的辅助止血治疗。

text.en: Documentation is required, but it is not prioritized over active hemorrhage source control and resuscitation.
text.zh: 护理记录必须完成，但优先级不能高于活动性出血的止血源控制和复苏。

testTakingStrategy.en: When a hemorrhage item lists many tasks, separate source control and resuscitation from tasks that can be assigned to helpers. Do not convert concurrent priorities into a fake sequence.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 出血题列出多项任务时，先区分“止血源控制和复苏”与可交给他人完成的任务；不要把并行优先事项误当成严格顺序。

definition.en: An antifibrinolytic adjunct used to reduce bleeding; it is not a uterotonic.
definition.zh: 一种抗纤溶辅助止血药；不是宫缩药。

definition.en: Manual compression of the uterus to reduce bleeding while definitive treatment is underway.
definition.zh: 在进行进一步治疗时用双手压迫子宫以减少出血。

definition.en: Blood-bank testing to prepare compatible blood for transfusion.
definition.zh: 血库为输注相容血液所做的检测。

stem.en: Classify each Stage 3 finding as evidence of early stabilization or as a finding that still requires close monitoring/continued concern.
stem.zh: 请将第 3 阶段每项发现分类为“早期稳定证据”或“仍需严密监测/持续关注”。

text.en: Evidence of early stabilization
text.zh: 早期稳定证据

text.en: Requires continued concern/monitoring
text.zh: 仍需持续关注/监测

text.en: Uterus is firm and contracted at the umbilicus.
text.zh: 子宫坚硬收缩，位于脐水平。

text.en: Lochia has decreased to moderate dark-red flow without clots.
text.zh: 恶露减少为中等量暗红色且无血块。

text.en: Quantitative blood loss has plateaued at 1,450 mL with no new accumulation for 15 minutes.
text.zh: 定量失血停留在 1,450 mL，15 分钟内无新增积血。

text.en: Client is alert, oriented, and no longer confused.
text.zh: 患者清醒、定向力正常，不再意识混乱。

text.en: Blood pressure has improved from 80/52 to 94/60 mmHg.
text.zh: 血压从 80/52 mmHg 改善至 94/60 mmHg。

text.en: Hemoglobin is 7.4 g/dL after crystalloid resuscitation and transfusion has begun.
text.zh: 晶体液复苏后血红蛋白为 7.4 g/dL，输血已开始。

text.en: Fibrinogen has trended down from 410 to 280 to 240 mg/dL.
text.zh: 纤维蛋白原从 410 降至 280 再降至 240 mg/dL。

text.en: Foley output is 25 mL/hr of concentrated amber urine.
text.zh: Foley 尿量为 25 mL/hr，呈浓缩琥珀色。

text.en: Heart rate is improved but remains 112 beats/min.
text.zh: 心率较前改善但仍为 112 次/分。

correct.en: The case is improving because uterine tone is restored, lochia is reduced, QBL has plateaued, mentation is clear, and BP is trending up. She is not fully stable: hemoglobin remains severely low, fibrinogen is falling, urine output is below 30 mL/hr, and tachycardia persists, so transfusion and close monitoring must continue.
correct.zh: 本例出现改善，因为子宫张力恢复、恶露减少、定量失血停止上升、意识转清、血压回升。但患者尚未完全稳定：血红蛋白仍很低，纤维蛋白原继续下降，尿量低于 30 mL/hr，心动过速持续，因此必须继续输血和严密监测。

text.en: A firm contracted uterus means the bleeding source is controlled for now.
text.zh: 子宫坚硬收缩说明目前出血来源已得到控制。

text.en: Decreased lochia without clots supports improved uterine control of bleeding.
text.zh: 恶露减少且无血块支持子宫对出血控制改善。

text.en: A plateau in measured blood loss is a direct sign that active accumulation has stopped.
text.zh: 定量失血不再上升直接说明活动性积血已停止。

text.en: Clearing mental status indicates improving cerebral perfusion after resuscitation.
text.zh: 意识转清提示复苏后脑灌注改善。

text.en: The BP is still low but improved from the shock-level reading, supporting early stabilization.
text.zh: 血压仍偏低，但较休克时改善，支持早期稳定。

text.en: This confirms major red-cell loss and need for continued transfusion; with controlled bleeding it does not alone prove rebleeding.
text.zh: 这证实红细胞丢失严重，需要继续输血；在出血受控时，它本身不能证明再出血。

text.en: The value remains above the critical 200 mg/dL threshold but the downward trend requires close monitoring for coagulopathy.
text.zh: 数值仍高于 200 mg/dL 临界值，但下降趋势需要严密监测凝血障碍。

text.en: Urine output below 30 mL/hr indicates ongoing renal hypoperfusion from volume deficit.
text.zh: 尿量低于 30 mL/hr 提示容量不足导致肾灌注仍差。

text.en: Persistent tachycardia means physiologic recovery is incomplete even though the trend is better.
text.zh: 持续心动过速说明生理恢复尚未完成，即使趋势已有改善。

testTakingStrategy.en: In evaluation items, separate source control from systemic recovery. A firm uterus tells you bleeding is controlled; urine output, HR, hemoglobin, and fibrinogen tell you whether shock and coagulopathy are resolving.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 评价类题目要把“出血来源控制”与“全身恢复”分开看。子宫坚硬说明出血受控；尿量、心率、血红蛋白和纤维蛋白原反映休克和凝血状态是否恢复。

definition.en: Low urine output, often defined clinically as less than 30 mL/hr in adults.
definition.zh: 尿量减少，成人临床上常以低于 30 mL/hr 作为重要警讯。

definition.en: A clotting factor that can fall early during major obstetric hemorrhage.
definition.zh: 一种凝血因子，在严重产科出血中可较早下降。

definition.en: Lower measured blood concentration after fluid resuscitation dilutes the remaining blood components.
definition.zh: 补液复苏后剩余血液成分被稀释，导致测得浓度下降。

stem.en: Which findings would signal the need to anticipate escalation to intrauterine balloon tamponade or surgical intervention? Select all that apply.
stem.zh: 哪些发现提示需要预期升级至宫腔球囊填塞或手术干预？选择所有适用项。

text.en: The uterus becomes boggy again with renewed heavy lochia.
text.zh: 子宫再次变松软，并重新出现大量恶露。

text.en: Quantitative blood loss resumes climbing despite uterotonics and compression.
text.zh: 尽管已使用宫缩药和压迫，定量失血仍继续上升。

text.en: Fibrinogen falls below 200 mg/dL with ongoing bleeding risk.
text.zh: 纤维蛋白原降至 200 mg/dL 以下，并存在持续出血风险。

text.en: Hemoglobin is 7.4 g/dL while the uterus is firm and QBL is plateaued.
text.zh: 子宫坚硬且定量失血停止上升时，血红蛋白为 7.4 g/dL。

text.en: Urine output remains 25 mL/hr but bleeding remains controlled.
text.zh: 尿量仍为 25 mL/hr，但出血保持受控。

text.en: Heart rate improves from 132 to 112 beats/min.
text.zh: 心率从 132 次/分改善至 112 次/分。

correct.en: Escalation is driven by loss of source control or evolving coagulopathy: recurrent bogginess with heavy bleeding, QBL that rises despite uterotonics and compression, or fibrinogen falling below the critical threshold. Low hemoglobin, oliguria, or persistent tachycardia require treatment and monitoring, but when bleeding is controlled they do not by themselves mandate surgical escalation.
correct.zh: 升级处理主要由出血来源失控或凝血障碍进展驱动：子宫再次松软并大量出血、在宫缩药和压迫后定量失血仍上升，或纤维蛋白原低于临界值。低血红蛋白、少尿或持续心动过速需要治疗和监测；但在出血受控时，它们本身不必然要求手术升级。

text.en: Correct: recurrent atony with renewed heavy bleeding means source control has failed and escalation is needed.
text.zh: 正确：子宫收缩乏力复发并再次大量出血，说明止血源控制失败，需要升级处理。

text.en: Correct: continued measured blood loss despite uterotonics/compression suggests need for balloon tamponade or operative control.
text.zh: 正确：在宫缩药和压迫后定量失血仍上升，提示可能需要球囊填塞或手术止血。

text.en: Correct: fibrinogen below 200 mg/dL during obstetric bleeding is a critical coagulopathy warning and supports escalation of hemorrhage management.
text.zh: 正确：产科出血时纤维蛋白原低于 200 mg/dL 是凝血障碍的重要警讯，支持升级出血处理。

text.en: With a firm uterus and plateaued QBL, the low hemoglobin supports transfusion and reassessment, not surgery by itself.
text.zh: 在子宫坚硬且定量失血停止上升时，低血红蛋白支持输血和复查，本身不等于需要手术。

text.en: Low urine output shows ongoing hypoperfusion and need for resuscitation, but without recurrent bleeding it is not a direct surgical trigger.
text.zh: 尿量低提示灌注不足，需要继续复苏；但若没有再出血，它不是直接手术指征。

text.en: Improved but persistent tachycardia requires monitoring; it is not an escalation trigger when bleeding is controlled.
text.zh: 心率虽仍偏快但已有改善，需要监测；在出血受控时不是升级处理触发点。

testTakingStrategy.en: Do not treat every abnormal lab or vital sign as a surgical trigger. Escalation follows uncontrolled bleeding, recurrent atony, or coagulopathy crossing a critical threshold.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 不要把每个异常化验或生命体征都当作手术触发点。升级处理通常取决于出血失控、子宫收缩乏力复发，或凝血指标跨过关键阈值。

definition.en: Placement of a balloon inside the uterus to apply pressure and reduce bleeding.
definition.zh: 将球囊置入子宫腔内，通过压力减少出血。

definition.en: A surgical compression suture used to control severe uterine bleeding.
definition.zh: 用于控制严重子宫出血的一种外科压迫缝合。

definition.en: Impaired clot formation that can worsen ongoing hemorrhage.
definition.zh: 凝血形成受损，可加重持续出血。

correct.en: This case follows recognition, treatment, and evaluation of early postpartum hemorrhage from uterine atony. The decisive cues are heavy bleeding, QBL above the vaginal-birth PPH threshold, a boggy displaced uterus that will not maintain tone, tachycardia, hypotension relative to a hypertensive baseline, poor perfusion, and bladder distention. The intact laceration repair and later exploration narrow the source away from trauma or retained tissue. Priority care is concurrent: maintain uterine compression/massage, administer a safe uterotonic, restore volume through large-bore IV access, prepare blood, and give ordered TXA within the unit protocol. Misoprostol is the safe second-line uterotonic because methylergonovine is contraindicated by pregnancy-induced hypertension and carboprost is unsafe with asthma. Improvement is shown by a firm uterus, decreased lochia, plateaued QBL, clearer mentation, and rising BP; continued concern is shown by anemia, downward fibrinogen trend, oliguria, and persistent tachycardia.
correct.zh: 本病例呈现早期子宫收缩乏力性产后出血的识别、处理和评价。决定性线索包括大量出血、定量失血超过阴道分娩产后出血阈值、子宫底偏移且松软并不能维持张力、心动过速、相对妊娠期高血压基线明显下降的血压、灌注不良以及膀胱充盈。会阴修补处完整以及后续探查结果，使出血来源不支持创伤或胎盘残留。优先护理是并行进行的：维持子宫压迫/按摩，给予安全宫缩药，通过大口径 IV 恢复容量，准备血制品，并按病区方案给予已医嘱的氨甲环酸。米索前列醇是安全的二线宫缩药，因为妊娠期高血压禁用甲基麦角新碱，哮喘病史使卡前列素不安全。改善表现为子宫坚硬、恶露减少、定量失血停止上升、意识转清、血压回升；仍需关注的表现包括贫血、纤维蛋白原下降趋势、少尿和持续心动过速。

testTakingStrategy.en: For postpartum hemorrhage, use the four-T framework but let uterine tone lead the first hypothesis. A boggy uterus means tone/atony until proven otherwise; management must control the source and restore perfusion at the same time.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 处理产后出血题可使用“四个 T”框架，但第一假设要由子宫张力决定。子宫松软时优先考虑张力问题/子宫收缩乏力；处理必须同时控制出血来源并恢复灌注。

definition.en: Excessive bleeding after birth; traditionally at least 500 mL after vaginal birth or bleeding with signs of hypovolemia.
definition.zh: 分娩后过量出血；传统上指阴道分娩后至少 500 mL，或伴低血容量表现的出血。

definition.en: Failure of the postpartum uterus to contract firmly enough to stop placental-site bleeding.
definition.zh: 产后子宫不能充分收缩，无法止住胎盘附着部位出血。

definition.en: Objective measurement of blood loss using weighed materials and collected blood.
definition.zh: 通过称重材料和收集血液进行客观失血测量。

definition.en: Medication used to stimulate uterine contraction.
definition.zh: 用于促进子宫收缩的药物。

definition.en: Urine output below expected minimum, a sign of poor renal perfusion in shock.
definition.zh: 尿量低于预期最低值，是休克中肾灌注不足的表现。

questions.topic: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony

stem.en: A 32-year-old G5P5 client is 90 minutes postpartum after vaginal birth of a 4.2 kg infant. She has pregnancy-induced hypertension treated with labetalol and mild intermittent asthma. She has persistent heavy bleeding despite oxytocin and fundal massage. QBL is 1,200 mL, HR 132, BP 80/52, and she is confused and pale. The uterus is intermittently boggy and relaxes within seconds after massage. Bedside exploration shows no retained placental fragments and no cervical or vaginal lacerations beyond the repaired second-degree perineal tear. Select the most likely condition, two priority actions, and two parameters to monitor.
stem.zh: 一名 32 岁 G5P5 产妇阴道分娩 4.2 kg 新生儿后 90 分钟。她有妊娠期高血压，使用拉贝洛尔治疗，并有轻度间歇性哮喘。尽管已使用催产素和子宫底按摩，她仍持续大量出血。定量失血 1,200 mL，HR 132，BP 80/52，患者意识混乱、面色苍白。子宫间歇性松软，按摩后数秒内又松弛。床旁探查未见胎盘碎片残留，也无宫颈或阴道裂伤，只有已修补的二度会阴裂伤。请选择最可能的情况、两个优先措施和两个需要监测的参数。

text.en: Postpartum hemorrhage due to uterine atony
text.zh: 子宫收缩乏力导致的产后出血

text.en: Cervical or vaginal laceration
text.zh: 宫颈或阴道裂伤

text.en: Primary obstetric coagulopathy
text.zh: 原发性产科凝血障碍

text.en: Maintain continuous uterine massage/compression
text.zh: 持续进行子宫按摩/压迫

text.en: Administer misoprostol 800 mcg rectally
text.zh: 给予米索前列醇 800 mcg 经直肠给药

text.en: Administer methylergonovine 0.2 mg IM
text.zh: 给予甲基麦角新碱 0.2 mg IM

text.en: Stop fundal massage to draw labs and document
text.zh: 停止子宫底按摩以抽血并记录

text.en: Uterine tone and fundal firmness
text.zh: 子宫张力和子宫底坚硬度

text.en: Quantitative blood loss trend
text.zh: 定量失血趋势

text.en: Neonatal Apgar scores
text.zh: 新生儿 Apgar 评分

text.en: Serum creatinine as the immediate trajectory marker
text.zh: 将血清肌酐作为即时病情趋势指标

correct.en: Persistent bleeding with a boggy uterus that will not sustain tone after massage identifies uterine atony. Exploration has ruled out retained fragments and unrepaired lacerations, and the coagulation profile has not made coagulopathy the primary driver. Priority actions are continuous uterine compression and a safe uterotonic; misoprostol avoids the client's hypertension and asthma contraindications. The most immediate response parameters are uterine tone and measured blood-loss trend.
correct.zh: 持续出血并伴有按摩后不能维持张力的松软子宫，指向子宫收缩乏力。探查已排除胎盘碎片残留和未修补裂伤，凝血资料也不支持凝血障碍为主要驱动因素。优先措施是持续子宫压迫和安全宫缩药；米索前列醇可避开该患者高血压和哮喘相关禁忌。最直接的反应监测参数是子宫张力和定量失血趋势。

text.en: Correct: the boggy uterus, failure to sustain tone, escalating QBL, and risk factors identify atony.
text.zh: 正确：子宫松软、不能维持张力、定量失血增加以及风险因素均指向子宫收缩乏力。

text.en: Wrong: bedside exploration found no cervical or vaginal lacerations beyond the repaired tear, and the uterus is boggy.
text.zh: 错误：床旁探查未发现除已修补裂伤外的宫颈或阴道裂伤，且子宫松软。

text.en: Wrong as the primary diagnosis now: fibrinogen 280 mg/dL, INR 1.1, and aPTT 30 sec do not make coagulopathy the main cause at this moment.
text.zh: 作为当前主要诊断错误：纤维蛋白原 280 mg/dL、INR 1.1、aPTT 30 秒，不支持凝血障碍是此刻主要原因。

text.en: Correct: continuous compression maintains source control while medications and resuscitation take effect.
text.zh: 正确：持续压迫可在药物和复苏发挥作用期间维持止血源控制。

text.en: Correct: misoprostol is the safe uterotonic among the listed options for a client with hypertension and asthma.
text.zh: 正确：在列出的药物中，米索前列醇对同时有高血压和哮喘的患者最安全。

text.en: Wrong: methylergonovine is contraindicated with pregnancy-induced hypertension despite current hemorrhagic hypotension.
text.zh: 错误：即使当前因失血而低血压，妊娠期高血压仍禁用甲基麦角新碱。

text.en: Wrong: stopping compression for labs or documentation can allow renewed bleeding from the atonic uterus.
text.zh: 错误：为了抽血或记录而停止压迫，可能使松软子宫再次出血。

text.en: Correct: fundal tone is the immediate bedside indicator of whether atony is controlled.
text.zh: 正确：子宫底张力是床旁判断子宫收缩乏力是否受控的即时指标。

text.en: Correct: QBL trend shows whether hemorrhage is plateauing or escalating.
text.zh: 正确：定量失血趋势显示出血是在停止上升还是继续加重。

text.en: Wrong: the newborn's status does not guide immediate management of the maternal hemorrhage.
text.zh: 错误：新生儿状态不能指导此刻母体出血的即时处理。

text.en: Wrong for immediate trajectory: creatinine can lag behind acute hypoperfusion; urine output is the real-time renal perfusion cue.
text.zh: 作为即时趋势指标错误：肌酐对急性低灌注反应滞后；尿量才是实时肾灌注线索。

testTakingStrategy.en: In bowtie items, lock the condition to the most decisive cue first. Here the decisive cue is uterine tone; then choose actions and monitoring that directly control and track that condition.
testTakingStrategy.zh: 做 bowtie 题时，先用最决定性的线索锁定病情。本题决定性线索是子宫张力；随后选择能直接控制并追踪该病情的措施和监测项目。

definition.en: Firmness of the postpartum uterus, assessed by fundal palpation.
definition.zh: 通过触诊子宫底评估产后子宫的坚硬程度。

definition.en: Loss of normal muscle tone or contraction.
definition.zh: 正常肌肉张力或收缩能力下降。

definition.en: Objective measurement of cumulative blood loss.
definition.zh: 对累计失血量进行客观测量。
